## Type of Change

## Checklist

### Code Functionality / Quality

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] The project builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Code formatting is correct (`npm run prettier:check`)
- [ ] No unnecessary code, comments, or debug statements are left behind

### Documentation / Translation

- [ ] I have updated both locale files (`de.ts` and `en.ts`) if changes were made to the UI
- [ ] I have adjusted `README.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md` if applicable
- [ ] I have updated the Wiki if any features were changed, in terms of usage or functionality
